problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Combining Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
